segments.text: The Lord said to Moses,
Speak to the Israelites and say to them:
I am the Lord your God.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You must not do as they do in Egypt, where you used to live, and you must not do as they do in the land of Canaan, where I am bringing you. Do not follow their practices.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You must obey my laws and be careful to follow my decrees. I am the Lord your God.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Keep my decrees and laws, for the person who obeys them will live by them. I am the Lord.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: No one is to approach any close relative to have sexual relations. I am the Lord.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Do not dishonor your father by having sexual relations with your mother. She is your mother; do not have relations with her.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Do not have sexual relations with your father's wife; that would dishonor your father.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Do not have sexual relations with your sister, either your father's daughter or your mother's daughter, whether she was born in the same home or elsewhere.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Do not have sexual relations with your son's daughter or your daughter's daughter; that would dishonor you.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Do not have sexual relations with the daughter of your father's wife, born to your father; she is your sister.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Do not have sexual relations with your father's sister; she is your father's close relative.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Do not have sexual relations with your mother's sister, because she is your mother's close relative.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Do not dishonor your father's brother by approaching his wife to have sexual relations; she is your aunt.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Do not have sexual relations with your daughter-in-law. She is your son's wife; do not have relations with her.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Do not have sexual relations with your brother's wife; that would dishonor your brother.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Do not have sexual relations with both a woman and her daughter. Do not have sexual relations with either her son's daughter or her daughter's daughter; they are her close relatives. That is wickedness.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Do not take your wife's sister as a rival wife and have sexual relations with her while your wife is living.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Do not approach a woman to have sexual relations during the uncleanness of her monthly period.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Do not have sexual relations with your neighbor's wife and defile yourself with her.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Do not give any of your children to be sacrificed to Molek, for you must not profane the name of your God. I am the Lord.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Do not have sexual relations with a man as one does with a woman; that is detestable.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Do not have sexual relations with an animal and defile yourself with it. A woman must not present herself to an animal to have sexual relations with it; that is a perversion.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Do not defile yourselves in any of these ways, because this is how the nations that I am going to drive out before you became defiled.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Even the land was defiled; so I punished it for its sin, and the land vomited out its inhabitants.
But you must keep my decrees and my laws. The native-born and the foreigners residing among you must not do any of these detestable things,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: for all these things were done by the people who lived in the land before you, and the land became defiled.
And if you defile the land, it will vomit you out as it vomited out the nations that were before you.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Everyone who does any of these detestable things—such persons must be cut off from their people.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Keep my requirements and do not follow any of the detestable customs that were practiced before you came and do not defile yourselves with them. I am the Lord your God.
segments.speaker: God
